idea-plugin.name: WSL Remote Companion
idea-plugin.description:
Small quality-of-life helpers for JetBrains Remote Development over WSL.

When the IDE backend runs on WSL (Linux), IntelliJ hides the actions that reach the Windows host. This plugin brings them back, using WSL interop (wslpath + explorer.exe):
  • Open in Explorer — reveal the selected file/folder in Windows Explorer.
  • Open in Windows native application — open the file with its associated Windows app.
  • Copy → Windows Path — copy the Windows form of the path (e.g. C:\… or \\wsl$\…).
The actions appear only when the backend is a WSL distro.

action.description: Reveal the selected file or folder in Windows Explorer (via WSL interop)
Open the selected file with its associated Windows application (via WSL interop)
Copy the Windows form of the selected file's path (via WSL interop)
